# Screenshots

This folder stores all generated plots and app screenshots.

## Auto-generated by scripts

| File                      | Generated by                  |
|---------------------------|-------------------------------|
| confusion_matrix.png      | `python src/evaluate_model.py` |
| roc_curve.png             | `python src/evaluate_model.py` |
| class_distribution.png    | `python app/dashboard.py`     |
| amount_distribution.png   | `python app/dashboard.py`     |
| correlation_heatmap.png   | `python app/dashboard.py`     |
| fraud_percentage.png      | `python app/dashboard.py`     |
| shap_explanation.png      | `python src/shap_explainer.py`|

## App Screenshots

Add screenshots of your running Streamlit app here for the README.
Naming convention: `app_home.png`, `app_predict.png`, `app_dashboard.png`
